 46→/**
 47→ * Ensures that annotation are wrapped to separate lines.
 48→ *
 49→ * https://kotlinlang.org/docs/reference/coding-conventions.html#annotation-formatting
 50→ *
 51→ * 1) Place annotations on separate lines before the declaration to which they are attached, and with the same indentation:
 52→ *
 53→ *    ```
 54→ *    @Target(AnnotationTarget.PROPERTY)
 55→ *    annotation class JsonExclude
 56→ *    ```
 57→ *
 58→ * 2) Annotations without arguments may be placed on the same line:
 59→ *
 60→ *    ```
 61→ *    @JsonExclude @JvmField
 62→ *    var x: String
 63→ *    ```
 64→ *
 65→ * 3) A single annotation without arguments may be placed on the same line as the corresponding declaration:
 66→ *
 67→ *    ```
 68→ *    @Test fun foo() { /*...*/ }
 69→ *    ```
 70→ *
 71→ * 4) File annotations are placed after the file comment (if any), before the package statement, and are separated from package with a blank
 72→ *    line (to emphasize the fact that they target the file and not the package).
 73→ *
 74→ * @see [AnnotationSpacingRule] for white space rules.
 75→ */
 76→public class AnnotationRule :
 77→    StandardRule(
 78→        id = "annotation",
 79→        usesEditorConfigProperties =
 80→            setOf(
 81→                INDENT_SIZE_PROPERTY,
 82→                INDENT_STYLE_PROPERTY,
 83→            ),
 84→        visitorModifiers =
 85→            setOf(
 86→                RunAfterRule(
 87→                    ruleId = ENUM_WRAPPING_RULE_ID,
 88→                    mode = REGARDLESS_WHETHER_RUN_AFTER_RULE_IS_LOADED_OR_DISABLED,
 89→                ),
 90→            ),
 91→    ) {
 92→    private var codeStyle = CODE_STYLE_PROPERTY.defaultValue
 93→    private var indentConfig = IndentConfig.DEFAULT_INDENT_CONFIG
 94→
 95→    override fun beforeFirstNode(editorConfig: EditorConfig) {
 96→        codeStyle = editorConfig[CODE_STYLE_PROPERTY]
 97→        indentConfig = IndentConfig(
 98→            indentStyle = editorConfig[INDENT_STYLE_PROPERTY],
 99→            tabWidth = editorConfig[INDENT_SIZE_PROPERTY],
100→        )
101→    }
102→
103→    override fun beforeVisitChildNodes(
104→        node: ASTNode,
105→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
106→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
107→    ) {
108→        when (node.elementType) {
109→            FILE_ANNOTATION_LIST -> {
110→                visitFileAnnotationList(node, emit, autoCorrect)
111→            }
112→            ANNOTATION -> {
113→                // Annotation array
114→                //     @[...]
115→                visitAnnotation(node, emit, autoCorrect)
116→            }
117→            ANNOTATION_ENTRY -> {
118→                visitAnnotationEntry(node, emit, autoCorrect)
119→            }
120→        }
121→    }
122→
123→    private fun visitAnnotationEntry(
124→        node: ASTNode,
125→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
126→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
127→    ) {
128→        require(node.elementType == ANNOTATION_ENTRY)
129→
130→        if (node.isAnnotationEntryWithValueArgumentList() &&
131→            node.treeParent.treeParent.elementType != VALUE_PARAMETER &&
132→            node.treeParent.treeParent.elementType != VALUE_ARGUMENT &&
133→            node.isNotReceiverTargetAnnotation()
134→        ) {
135→            // Disallow:
136→            //     @Foo class Bar
137→            // Allow function parameters and arguments to have annotation on same line as identifier:
138→            //     fun @receiver:Bar String.foo() {}
139→            //     fun foo(
140→            //         @Bar("bar") bar,
141→            //         @Bar("bar") "42",
142→            //     ) {}
143→            checkForAnnotationWithParameterToBePlacedOnSeparateLine(node, emit, autoCorrect)
144→        }
145→
146→        if (node.isOnSameLineAsAnnotatedConstruct()) {
147→            if (node.isPrecededByAnnotationOnAnotherLine()) {
148→                // Code below is disallowed
149→                //   @Foo1
150→                //   @Foo2 fun foo() {}
151→                emit(
152→                    node.startOffset,
153→                    "Annotation must be placed on a separate line when it is preceded by another annotation on a separate line",
154→                    true,
155→                )
156→                if (autoCorrect) {
157→                    node
158→                        .lastChildLeafOrSelf()
159→                        .nextLeaf()
160→                        ?.upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe(getNewlineWithIndent(node.treeParent))
161→                }
162→            }
163→
164→            if (node.treeParent.elementType != ANNOTATION &&
165→                node.treeParent.treeParent.elementType != VALUE_PARAMETER &&
166→                node.treeParent.treeParent.elementType != VALUE_ARGUMENT &&
167→                node.isPrecededByOtherAnnotationEntryOnTheSameLine() &&
168→                node.isLastAnnotationEntry()
169→            ) {
170→                // Code below is disallowed
171→                //   @Foo1 @Foo2 fun foo() {}
172→                // But following is allowed:
173→                //   @[Foo1 Foo2] fun foo() {}
174→                //   fun foo(@Bar1 @Bar2 bar) {}
175→                emit(
176→                    node.findAnnotatedConstruct().startOffset,
177→                    "Multiple annotations should not be placed on the same line as the annotated construct",
178→                    true,
179→                )
180→                if (autoCorrect) {
181→                    node
182→                        .lastChildLeafOrSelf()
183→                        .nextCodeLeaf()
184→                        ?.upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe(
185→                            getNewlineWithIndent(node.treeParent)
186→                                .applyIf(node.typeProjectionOrNull() != null) {
187→                                    plus(indentConfig.indent)
188→                                },
189→                        )
190→                }
191→            }
192→
193→            node.typeProjectionOrNull()
194→                ?.prevCodeLeaf()
195→                ?.let { startOfList ->
196→                    // Code below is disallowed
197→                    //   var foo: List<@Foo1 @Foo2 String>
198→                    // But following is allowed:
199→                    //   var foo: List<@[Foo1 Foo2] String>
200→                    //   fun foo(@Bar1 @Bar2 bar) {}
201→                    if (node.isFollowedByOtherAnnotationEntryOnTheSameLine() &&
202→                        node.isFirstAnnotationEntry()
203→                    ) {
204→                        emit(startOfList.startOffset, "Expected newline after '${startOfList.text}'", true)
205→                        if (autoCorrect) {
206→                            startOfList
207→                                .upsertWhitespaceAfterMe(
208→                                    getNewlineWithIndent(node.treeParent).plus(indentConfig.indent),
209→                                )
210→                        }
211→                    }
212→                    if (node.isPrecededByOtherAnnotationEntryOnTheSameLine() &&
213→                        node.isLastAnnotationEntry()
214→                    ) {
215→                        node
216→                            .findAnnotatedConstruct()
217→                            .treeParent
218→                            .lastChildLeafOrSelf()
219→                            .nextLeaf { it.isCodeLeaf() && it.elementType != ElementType.COMMA }
220→                            ?.let { codeLeaf ->
221→                                emit(codeLeaf.startOffset, "Expected newline before '${codeLeaf.text}'", true)
222→                                if (autoCorrect) {
223→                                    codeLeaf.upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe(getNewlineWithIndent(node.treeParent))
224→                                }
225→                            }
226→                    }
227→                }
228→        }
229→
230→        if (node.isPrecededByOtherAnnotationEntryOnTheSameLine() && node.isPrecededByAnnotationOnAnotherLine()) {
231→            // Code below is disallowed
232→            //   @Foo1
233→            //   @Foo2 @Foo3
234→            //   fun foo() {}
235→            emit(
236→                node.startOffset,
237→                "All annotations should either be on a single line or all annotations should be on a separate line",
238→                true,
239→            )
240→            if (autoCorrect) {
241→                node
242→                    .firstChildLeafOrSelf()
243→                    .upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe(getNewlineWithIndent(node.treeParent))
244→            }
245→        }
246→    }
247→
248→    private fun ASTNode.typeProjectionOrNull() =
249→        takeIf { elementType == ANNOTATION_ENTRY }
250→            ?.takeIf { it.treeParent.elementType == MODIFIER_LIST }
251→            ?.treeParent
252→            ?.takeIf { it.treeParent.elementType == TYPE_REFERENCE }
253→            ?.treeParent
254→            ?.takeIf { it.treeParent.elementType == TYPE_PROJECTION }
255→            ?.treeParent
256→
257→    private fun ASTNode.isPrecededByAnnotationOnAnotherLine(): Boolean {
258→        val firstAnnotation = treeParent.findChildByType(ANNOTATION_ENTRY)
259→        return siblings(forward = false)
260→            .takeWhile { it != firstAnnotation }
261→            .any { it.isWhiteSpaceWithNewline() }
262→    }
263→
264→    private fun checkForAnnotationWithParameterToBePlacedOnSeparateLine(
265→        node: ASTNode,
266→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
267→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
268→    ) {
269→        if (node.isPrecededByOtherAnnotationEntry() && node.isOnSameLineAsPreviousAnnotationEntry()) {
270→            emit(
271→                node.startOffset,
272→                "Annotation with parameter(s) should be placed on a separate line prior to the annotated construct",
273→                true,
274→            )
275→            if (autoCorrect) {
276→                node
277→                    .firstChildLeafOrSelf()
278→                    .upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe(" ")
279→            }
280→        }
281→
282→        if (node.isOnSameLineAsNextAnnotationEntryOrAnnotatedConstruct()) {
283→            emit(
284→                node.startOffset,
285→                "Annotation with parameter(s) should be placed on a separate line prior to the annotated construct",
286→                // Annotated expressions for which the annotation contains a parameter can be hard to correct
287→                // automatically. See examples below. For now, let them be fixed manually.
288→                // fun foo1() = @Suppress("DEPRECATION") bar()
289→                // if (@Suppress("DEPRECATION") bar()) { .. }
290→                node.treeParent.elementType != ANNOTATED_EXPRESSION,
291→            )
292→            if (autoCorrect) {
293→                node
294→                    .lastChildLeafOrSelf()
295→                    .nextLeaf()
296→                    .safeAs<LeafPsiElement>()
297→                    ?.let {
298→                        if (it.elementType == WHITE_SPACE) {
299→                            it.replaceWithText(getNewlineWithIndent(node.treeParent))
300→                        } else {
301→                            it.rawInsertBeforeMe(
302→                                PsiWhiteSpaceImpl(getNewlineWithIndent(node.treeParent)),
303→                            )
304→                        }
305→                    }
306→            }
307→        }
308→    }
309→
310→    private fun ASTNode.isNotReceiverTargetAnnotation() = getAnnotationUseSiteTarget() != AnnotationUseSiteTarget.RECEIVER
311→
312→    private fun ASTNode.getAnnotationUseSiteTarget() =
313→        psi
314→            .safeAs<KtAnnotationEntry>()
315→            ?.useSiteTarget
316→            ?.getAnnotationUseSiteTarget()
317→
318→    private fun ASTNode.isAnnotationEntryWithValueArgumentList() = getAnnotationEntryValueArgumentList() != null
319→
320→    private fun ASTNode.getAnnotationEntryValueArgumentList() =
321→        takeIf { it.elementType == ANNOTATION_ENTRY }
322→            ?.findChildByType(VALUE_ARGUMENT_LIST)
323→
324→    private fun ASTNode.isFirstAnnotationEntry() =
325→        this ==
326→            treeParent
327→                .children()
328→                .firstOrNull { it.elementType == ANNOTATION_ENTRY }
329→
330→    private fun ASTNode.isLastAnnotationEntry() =
331→        this ==
332→            treeParent
333→                .children()
334→                .lastOrNull { it.elementType == ANNOTATION_ENTRY }
335→
336→    private fun ASTNode.isPrecededByOtherAnnotationEntryOnTheSameLine() =
337→        siblings(forward = false)
338→            .takeWhile { !it.isWhiteSpaceWithNewline() }
339→            .any { it.elementType == ANNOTATION_ENTRY }
340→
341→    private fun ASTNode.isFollowedByOtherAnnotationEntryOnTheSameLine() =
342→        siblings()
343→            .takeWhile { !it.isWhiteSpaceWithNewline() }
344→            .any { it.elementType == ANNOTATION_ENTRY }
345→
346→    private fun ASTNode.isPrecededByOtherAnnotationEntry() =
347→        siblings(forward = false)
348→            .any { it.elementType == ANNOTATION_ENTRY }
349→
350→    private fun ASTNode.isOnSameLineAsPreviousAnnotationEntry() =
351→        siblings(forward = false)
352→            .takeWhile { it.elementType != ANNOTATION_ENTRY }
353→            .none { it.isWhiteSpaceWithNewline() }
354→
355→    private fun ASTNode.isFollowedByOtherAnnotationEntry() = siblings(forward = true).any { it.elementType == ANNOTATION_ENTRY }
356→
357→    private fun ASTNode.isOnSameLineAsNextAnnotationEntry() =
358→        siblings(forward = true)
359→            .takeWhile { it.elementType != ANNOTATION_ENTRY }
360→            .none { it.isWhiteSpaceWithNewline() }
361→
362→    private fun ASTNode.isOnSameLineAsAnnotatedConstruct(): Boolean {
363→        val annotatedConstruct = findAnnotatedConstruct()
364→        return lastChildLeafOrSelf()
365→            .leaves(forward = true)
366→            .takeWhile { it != annotatedConstruct }
367→            .none { it.isWhiteSpaceWithNewline() }
368→    }
369→
370→    private fun ASTNode.findAnnotatedConstruct(): ASTNode {
371→        val astNode =
372→            if (treeParent.elementType == MODIFIER_LIST) {
373→                treeParent
374→            } else {
375→                this
376→            }
377→        return checkNotNull(
378→            astNode.lastChildLeafOrSelf().nextCodeLeaf(),
379→        )
380→    }
381→
382→    private fun ASTNode.isOnSameLineAsNextAnnotationEntryOrAnnotatedConstruct() =
383→        if (isFollowedByOtherAnnotationEntry()) {
384→            isOnSameLineAsNextAnnotationEntry()
385→        } else {
386→            isOnSameLineAsAnnotatedConstruct()
387→        }
388→
389→    private fun visitFileAnnotationList(
390→        node: ASTNode,
391→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
392→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
393→    ) {
394→        node
395→            .lastChildLeafOrSelf()
396→            .nextCodeLeaf()
397→            ?.let { codeLeaf ->
398→                val whitespaceBefore = codeLeaf.prevLeaf { it.isWhiteSpace() }
399→
400→                if (whitespaceBefore == null || whitespaceBefore.text != "\n\n") {
401→                    emit(
402→                        codeLeaf.startOffset,
403→                        "File annotations should be separated from file contents with a blank line",
404→                        true,
405→                    )
406→                    if (autoCorrect) {
407→                        codeLeaf.upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe("\n\n")
408→                    }
409→                }
410→            }
411→    }
412→
413→    private fun visitAnnotation(
414→        node: ASTNode,
415→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
416→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
417→    ) {
418→        require(node.elementType == ANNOTATION)
419→
420→        if ((node.isFollowedByOtherAnnotationEntry() && node.isOnSameLineAsNextAnnotationEntry()) ||
421→            (node.isPrecededByOtherAnnotationEntry() && node.isOnSameLineAsPreviousAnnotationEntry())
422→        ) {
423→            emit(
424→                node.startOffset,
425→                "@[...] style annotations should be on a separate line from other annotations.",
426→                true,
427→            )
428→            if (autoCorrect) {
429→                if (node.isFollowedByOtherAnnotationEntry()) {
430→                    node.upsertWhitespaceAfterMe(getNewlineWithIndent(node.treeParent))
431→                } else if (node.isPrecededByOtherAnnotationEntry()) {
432→                    node.upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe(getNewlineWithIndent(node.treeParent))
433→                }
434→            }
435→        }
436→    }
437→
438→    private fun getNewlineWithIndent(modifierListRoot: ASTNode): String {
439→        val nodeBeforeAnnotations =
440→            modifierListRoot
441→                .treeParent
442→                .treePrev
443→        // Make sure we only insert a single newline
444→        val indentWithoutNewline =
445→            nodeBeforeAnnotations
446→                ?.text
447→                .orEmpty()
448→                .substringAfterLast('\n')
449→        return "\n".plus(indentWithoutNewline)
450→    }
451→}
452→
453→public val ANNOTATION_RULE_ID: RuleId = AnnotationRule().ruleId
454→

 49→/**
 50→ * Ensures that annotation are wrapped to separate lines.
 51→ *
 52→ * https://kotlinlang.org/docs/reference/coding-conventions.html#annotation-formatting
 53→ *
 54→ * 1) Place annotations on separate lines before the declaration to which they are attached, and with the same indentation:
 55→ *
 56→ *    ```
 57→ *    @Target(AnnotationTarget.PROPERTY)
 58→ *    annotation class JsonExclude
 59→ *    ```
 60→ *
 61→ * 2) Annotations without arguments may be placed on the same line:
 62→ *
 63→ *    ```
 64→ *    @JsonExclude @JvmField
 65→ *    var x: String
 66→ *    ```
 67→ *
 68→ * 3) A single annotation without arguments may be placed on the same line as the corresponding declaration:
 69→ *
 70→ *    ```
 71→ *    @Test fun foo() { /*...*/ }
 72→ *    ```
 73→ *
 74→ * 4) File annotations are placed after the file comment (if any), before the package statement, and are separated from package with a blank
 75→ *    line (to emphasize the fact that they target the file and not the package).
 76→ *
 77→ * @see [AnnotationSpacingRule] for white space rules.
 78→ */
 79→public class AnnotationRule :
 80→    StandardRule(
 81→        id = "annotation",
 82→        usesEditorConfigProperties =
 83→            setOf(
 84→                CODE_STYLE_PROPERTY,
 85→                INDENT_SIZE_PROPERTY,
 86→                INDENT_STYLE_PROPERTY,
 87→            ),
 88→        visitorModifiers =
 89→            setOf(
 90→                RunAfterRule(
 91→                    ruleId = ENUM_WRAPPING_RULE_ID,
 92→                    mode = REGARDLESS_WHETHER_RUN_AFTER_RULE_IS_LOADED_OR_DISABLED,
 93→                ),
 94→            ),
 95→    ) {
 96→    private var codeStyle = CODE_STYLE_PROPERTY.defaultValue
 97→    private var indentConfig = IndentConfig.DEFAULT_INDENT_CONFIG
 98→
 99→    override fun beforeFirstNode(editorConfig: EditorConfig) {
100→        codeStyle = editorConfig[CODE_STYLE_PROPERTY]
101→        indentConfig = IndentConfig(
102→            indentStyle = editorConfig[INDENT_STYLE_PROPERTY],
103→            tabWidth = editorConfig[INDENT_SIZE_PROPERTY],
104→        )
105→    }
106→
107→    override fun beforeVisitChildNodes(
108→        node: ASTNode,
109→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
110→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
111→    ) {
112→        when (node.elementType) {
113→            FILE_ANNOTATION_LIST -> {
114→                visitFileAnnotationList(node, emit, autoCorrect)
115→            }
116→            ANNOTATION -> {
117→                // Annotation array
118→                //     @[...]
119→                visitAnnotation(node, emit, autoCorrect)
120→            }
121→            ANNOTATION_ENTRY -> {
122→                visitAnnotationEntry(node, emit, autoCorrect)
123→            }
124→        }
125→    }
126→
127→    private fun visitAnnotationEntry(
128→        node: ASTNode,
129→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
130→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
131→    ) {
132→        require(node.elementType == ANNOTATION_ENTRY)
133→
134→        if (codeStyle == ktlint_official && node.isPrimaryConstructorAnnotation()) {
135→            visitPrimaryConstructorAnnotation(node, emit, autoCorrect)
136→            return
137→        }
138→
139→        if (node.isAnnotationEntryWithValueArgumentList() &&
140→            node.treeParent.treeParent.elementType != VALUE_PARAMETER &&
141→            node.treeParent.treeParent.elementType != VALUE_ARGUMENT &&
142→            node.isNotReceiverTargetAnnotation()
143→        ) {
144→            // Disallow:
145→            //     @Foo class Bar
146→            // Allow function parameters and arguments to have annotation on same line as identifier:
147→            //     fun @receiver:Bar String.foo() {}
148→            //     fun foo(
149→            //         @Bar("bar") bar,
150→            //         @Bar("bar") "42",
151→            //     ) {}
152→            checkForAnnotationWithParameterToBePlacedOnSeparateLine(node, emit, autoCorrect)
153→        }
154→
155→        if (node.isOnSameLineAsAnnotatedConstruct()) {
156→            if (node.isPrecededByAnnotationOnAnotherLine()) {
157→                // Code below is disallowed
158→                //   @Foo1
159→                //   @Foo2 fun foo() {}
160→                emit(
161→                    node.startOffset,
162→                    "Annotation must be placed on a separate line when it is preceded by another annotation on a separate line",
163→                    true,
164→                )
165→                if (autoCorrect) {
166→                    node
167→                        .lastChildLeafOrSelf()
168→                        .nextLeaf()
169→                        ?.upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe(getNewlineWithIndent(node.treeParent))
170→                }
171→            }
172→
173→            if (node.treeParent.elementType != ANNOTATION &&
174→                node.treeParent.treeParent.elementType != VALUE_PARAMETER &&
175→                node.treeParent.treeParent.elementType != VALUE_ARGUMENT &&
176→                node.isPrecededByOtherAnnotationEntryOnTheSameLine() &&
177→                node.isLastAnnotationEntry()
178→            ) {
179→                // Code below is disallowed
180→                //   @Foo1 @Foo2 fun foo() {}
181→                // But following is allowed:
182→                //   @[Foo1 Foo2] fun foo() {}
183→                //   fun foo(@Bar1 @Bar2 bar) {}
184→                emit(
185→                    node.findAnnotatedConstruct().startOffset,
186→                    "Multiple annotations should not be placed on the same line as the annotated construct",
187→                    true,
188→                )
189→                if (autoCorrect) {
190→                    node
191→                        .lastChildLeafOrSelf()
192→                        .nextCodeLeaf()
193→                        ?.upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe(
194→                            getNewlineWithIndent(node.treeParent)
195→                                .applyIf(node.typeProjectionOrNull() != null) {
196→                                    plus(indentConfig.indent)
197→                                },
198→                        )
199→                }
200→            }
201→
202→            node.typeProjectionOrNull()
203→                ?.prevCodeLeaf()
204→                ?.let { startOfList ->
205→                    // Code below is disallowed
206→                    //   var foo: List<@Foo1 @Foo2 String>
207→                    // But following is allowed:
208→                    //   var foo: List<@[Foo1 Foo2] String>
209→                    //   fun foo(@Bar1 @Bar2 bar) {}
210→                    if (node.isFollowedByOtherAnnotationEntryOnTheSameLine() &&
211→                        node.isFirstAnnotationEntry()
212→                    ) {
213→                        emit(startOfList.startOffset, "Expected newline after '${startOfList.text}'", true)
214→                        if (autoCorrect) {
215→                            startOfList
216→                                .upsertWhitespaceAfterMe(
217→                                    getNewlineWithIndent(node.treeParent).plus(indentConfig.indent),
218→                                )
219→                        }
220→                    }
221→                    if (node.isPrecededByOtherAnnotationEntryOnTheSameLine() &&
222→                        node.isLastAnnotationEntry()
223→                    ) {
224→                        node
225→                            .findAnnotatedConstruct()
226→                            .treeParent
227→                            .lastChildLeafOrSelf()
228→                            .nextLeaf { it.isCodeLeaf() && it.elementType != ElementType.COMMA }
229→                            ?.let { codeLeaf ->
230→                                emit(codeLeaf.startOffset, "Expected newline before '${codeLeaf.text}'", true)
231→                                if (autoCorrect) {
232→                                    codeLeaf.upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe(getNewlineWithIndent(node.treeParent))
233→                                }
234→                            }
235→                    }
236→                }
237→        }
238→
239→        if (node.isPrecededByOtherAnnotationEntryOnTheSameLine() && node.isPrecededByAnnotationOnAnotherLine()) {
240→            // Code below is disallowed
241→            //   @Foo1
242→            //   @Foo2 @Foo3
243→            //   fun foo() {}
244→            emit(
245→                node.startOffset,
246→                "All annotations should either be on a single line or all annotations should be on a separate line",
247→                true,
248→            )
249→            if (autoCorrect) {
250→                node
251→                    .firstChildLeafOrSelf()
252→                    .upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe(getNewlineWithIndent(node.treeParent))
253→            }
254→        }
255→    }
256→
257→    private fun ASTNode.typeProjectionOrNull() =
258→        takeIf { elementType == ANNOTATION_ENTRY }
259→            ?.takeIf { it.treeParent.elementType == MODIFIER_LIST }
260→            ?.treeParent
261→            ?.takeIf { it.treeParent.elementType == TYPE_REFERENCE }
262→            ?.treeParent
263→            ?.takeIf { it.treeParent.elementType == TYPE_PROJECTION }
264→            ?.treeParent
265→
266→    private fun ASTNode.isPrecededByAnnotationOnAnotherLine(): Boolean {
267→        val firstAnnotation = treeParent.findChildByType(ANNOTATION_ENTRY)
268→        return siblings(forward = false)
269→            .takeWhile { it != firstAnnotation }
270→            .any { it.isWhiteSpaceWithNewline() }
271→    }
272→
273→    private fun checkForAnnotationWithParameterToBePlacedOnSeparateLine(
274→        node: ASTNode,
275→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
276→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
277→    ) {
278→        if (node.isPrecededByOtherAnnotationEntry() && node.isOnSameLineAsPreviousAnnotationEntry()) {
279→            emit(
280→                node.startOffset,
281→                "Annotation with parameter(s) should be placed on a separate line prior to the annotated construct",
282→                true,
283→            )
284→            if (autoCorrect) {
285→                node
286→                    .firstChildLeafOrSelf()
287→                    .upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe(" ")
288→            }
289→        }
290→
291→        if (node.isOnSameLineAsNextAnnotationEntryOrAnnotatedConstruct()) {
292→            emit(
293→                node.startOffset,
294→                "Annotation with parameter(s) should be placed on a separate line prior to the annotated construct",
295→                // Annotated expressions for which the annotation contains a parameter can be hard to correct
296→                // automatically. See examples below. For now, let them be fixed manually.
297→                // fun foo1() = @Suppress("DEPRECATION") bar()
298→                // if (@Suppress("DEPRECATION") bar()) { .. }
299→                node.treeParent.elementType != ANNOTATED_EXPRESSION,
300→            )
301→            if (autoCorrect) {
302→                node
303→                    .lastChildLeafOrSelf()
304→                    .nextLeaf()
305→                    .safeAs<LeafPsiElement>()
306→                    ?.let {
307→                        if (it.elementType == WHITE_SPACE) {
308→                            it.replaceWithText(getNewlineWithIndent(node.treeParent))
309→                        } else {
310→                            it.rawInsertBeforeMe(
311→                                PsiWhiteSpaceImpl(getNewlineWithIndent(node.treeParent)),
312→                            )
313→                        }
314→                    }
315→            }
316→        }
317→    }
318→
319→    private fun ASTNode.isNotReceiverTargetAnnotation() = getAnnotationUseSiteTarget() != AnnotationUseSiteTarget.RECEIVER
320→
321→    private fun ASTNode.getAnnotationUseSiteTarget() =
322→        psi
323→            .safeAs<KtAnnotationEntry>()
324→            ?.useSiteTarget
325→            ?.getAnnotationUseSiteTarget()
326→
327→    private fun ASTNode.isAnnotationEntryWithValueArgumentList() = getAnnotationEntryValueArgumentList() != null
328→
329→    private fun ASTNode.getAnnotationEntryValueArgumentList() =
330→        takeIf { it.elementType == ANNOTATION_ENTRY }
331→            ?.findChildByType(VALUE_ARGUMENT_LIST)
332→
333→    private fun ASTNode.isFirstAnnotationEntry() =
334→        this ==
335→            treeParent
336→                .children()
337→                .firstOrNull { it.elementType == ANNOTATION_ENTRY }
338→
339→    private fun ASTNode.isLastAnnotationEntry() =
340→        this ==
341→            treeParent
342→                .children()
343→                .lastOrNull { it.elementType == ANNOTATION_ENTRY }
344→
345→    private fun ASTNode.isPrecededByOtherAnnotationEntryOnTheSameLine() =
346→        siblings(forward = false)
347→            .takeWhile { !it.isWhiteSpaceWithNewline() }
348→            .any { it.elementType == ANNOTATION_ENTRY }
349→
350→    private fun ASTNode.isFollowedByOtherAnnotationEntryOnTheSameLine() =
351→        siblings()
352→            .takeWhile { !it.isWhiteSpaceWithNewline() }
353→            .any { it.elementType == ANNOTATION_ENTRY }
354→
355→    private fun ASTNode.isPrecededByOtherAnnotationEntry() =
356→        siblings(forward = false)
357→            .any { it.elementType == ANNOTATION_ENTRY }
358→
359→    private fun ASTNode.isOnSameLineAsPreviousAnnotationEntry() =
360→        siblings(forward = false)
361→            .takeWhile { it.elementType != ANNOTATION_ENTRY }
362→            .none { it.isWhiteSpaceWithNewline() }
363→
364→    private fun ASTNode.isFollowedByOtherAnnotationEntry() = siblings(forward = true).any { it.elementType == ANNOTATION_ENTRY }
365→
366→    private fun ASTNode.isOnSameLineAsNextAnnotationEntry() =
367→        siblings(forward = true)
368→            .takeWhile { it.elementType != ANNOTATION_ENTRY }
369→            .none { it.isWhiteSpaceWithNewline() }
370→
371→    private fun ASTNode.isOnSameLineAsAnnotatedConstruct(): Boolean {
372→        val annotatedConstruct = findAnnotatedConstruct()
373→        return lastChildLeafOrSelf()
374→            .leaves(forward = true)
375→            .takeWhile { it != annotatedConstruct }
376→            .none { it.isWhiteSpaceWithNewline() }
377→    }
378→
379→    private fun ASTNode.findAnnotatedConstruct(): ASTNode {
380→        val astNode =
381→            if (treeParent.elementType == MODIFIER_LIST) {
382→                treeParent
383→            } else {
384→                this
385→            }
386→        return checkNotNull(
387→            astNode.lastChildLeafOrSelf().nextCodeLeaf(),
388→        )
389→    }
390→
391→    private fun ASTNode.isOnSameLineAsNextAnnotationEntryOrAnnotatedConstruct() =
392→        if (isFollowedByOtherAnnotationEntry()) {
393→            isOnSameLineAsNextAnnotationEntry()
394→        } else {
395→            isOnSameLineAsAnnotatedConstruct()
396→        }
397→
398→    private fun visitFileAnnotationList(
399→        node: ASTNode,
400→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
401→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
402→    ) {
403→        node
404→            .lastChildLeafOrSelf()
405→            .nextCodeLeaf()
406→            ?.let { codeLeaf ->
407→                val whitespaceBefore = codeLeaf.prevLeaf { it.isWhiteSpace() }
408→
409→                if (whitespaceBefore == null || whitespaceBefore.text != "\n\n") {
410→                    emit(
411→                        codeLeaf.startOffset,
412→                        "File annotations should be separated from file contents with a blank line",
413→                        true,
414→                    )
415→                    if (autoCorrect) {
416→                        codeLeaf.upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe("\n\n")
417→                    }
418→                }
419→            }
420→    }
421→
422→    private fun visitAnnotation(
423→        node: ASTNode,
424→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
425→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
426→    ) {
427→        require(node.elementType == ANNOTATION)
428→
429→        if ((node.isFollowedByOtherAnnotationEntry() && node.isOnSameLineAsNextAnnotationEntry()) ||
430→            (node.isPrecededByOtherAnnotationEntry() && node.isOnSameLineAsPreviousAnnotationEntry())
431→        ) {
432→            emit(
433→                node.startOffset,
434→                "@[...] style annotations should be on a separate line from other annotations.",
435→                true,
436→            )
437→            if (autoCorrect) {
438→                if (node.isFollowedByOtherAnnotationEntry()) {
439→                    node.upsertWhitespaceAfterMe(getNewlineWithIndent(node.treeParent))
440→                } else if (node.isPrecededByOtherAnnotationEntry()) {
441→                    node.upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe(getNewlineWithIndent(node.treeParent))
442→                }
443→            }
444→        }
445→    }
446→
447→    private fun getNewlineWithIndent(modifierListRoot: ASTNode): String {
448→        val nodeBeforeAnnotations =
449→            modifierListRoot
450→                .treeParent
451→                .treePrev
452→        // Make sure we only insert a single newline
453→        val indentWithoutNewline =
454→            nodeBeforeAnnotations
455→                ?.text
456→                .orEmpty()
457→                .substringAfterLast('\n')
458→        return "\n".plus(indentWithoutNewline)
459→    }
460→}
461→
462→public val ANNOTATION_RULE_ID: RuleId = AnnotationRule().ruleId

 49→/**
 50→ * Ensures that annotation are wrapped to separate lines.
 51→ *
 52→ * https://kotlinlang.org/docs/reference/coding-conventions.html#annotation-formatting
 53→ *
 54→ * 1) Place annotations on separate lines before the declaration to which they are attached, and with the same indentation:
 55→ *
 56→ *    ```
 57→ *    @Target(AnnotationTarget.PROPERTY)
 58→ *    annotation class JsonExclude
 59→ *    ```
 60→ *
 61→ * 2) Annotations without arguments may be placed on the same line:
 62→ *
 63→ *    ```
 64→ *    @JsonExclude @JvmField
 65→ *    var x: String
 66→ *    ```
 67→ *
 68→ * 3) A single annotation without arguments may be placed on the same line as the corresponding declaration:
 69→ *
 70→ *    ```
 71→ *    @Test fun foo() { /*...*/ }
 72→ *    ```
 73→ *
 74→ * 4) File annotations are placed after the file comment (if any), before the package statement, and are separated from package with a blank
 75→ *    line (to emphasize the fact that they target the file and not the package).
 76→ *
 77→ * @see [AnnotationSpacingRule] for white space rules.
 78→ */
 79→public class AnnotationRule :
 80→    StandardRule(
 81→        id = "annotation",
 82→        usesEditorConfigProperties =
 83→            setOf(
 84→                CODE_STYLE_PROPERTY,
 85→                INDENT_SIZE_PROPERTY,
 86→                INDENT_STYLE_PROPERTY,
 87→            ),
 88→        visitorModifiers =
 89→            setOf(
 90→                RunAfterRule(
 91→                    ruleId = ENUM_WRAPPING_RULE_ID,
 92→                    mode = REGARDLESS_WHETHER_RUN_AFTER_RULE_IS_LOADED_OR_DISABLED,
 93→                ),
 94→            ),
 95→    ) {
 96→    private var codeStyle = CODE_STYLE_PROPERTY.defaultValue
 97→    private var indentConfig = IndentConfig.DEFAULT_INDENT_CONFIG
 98→
 99→    override fun beforeFirstNode(editorConfig: EditorConfig) {
100→        codeStyle = editorConfig[CODE_STYLE_PROPERTY]
101→        indentConfig = IndentConfig(
102→            indentStyle = editorConfig[INDENT_STYLE_PROPERTY],
103→            tabWidth = editorConfig[INDENT_SIZE_PROPERTY],
104→        )
105→    }
106→
107→    override fun beforeVisitChildNodes(
108→        node: ASTNode,
109→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
110→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
111→    ) {
112→        when (node.elementType) {
113→            FILE_ANNOTATION_LIST -> {
114→                visitFileAnnotationList(node, emit, autoCorrect)
115→            }
116→            ANNOTATION -> {
117→                // Annotation array
118→                //     @[...]
119→                visitAnnotation(node, emit, autoCorrect)
120→            }
121→            ANNOTATION_ENTRY -> {
122→                visitAnnotationEntry(node, emit, autoCorrect)
123→            }
124→        }
125→    }
126→
127→    private fun visitAnnotationEntry(
128→        node: ASTNode,
129→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
130→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
131→    ) {
132→        require(node.elementType == ANNOTATION_ENTRY)
133→
134→        if (codeStyle == ktlint_official && node.isPrimaryConstructorAnnotation()) {
135→            visitPrimaryConstructorAnnotation(node, emit, autoCorrect)
136→            return
137→        }
138→
139→        if (node.isAnnotationEntryWithValueArgumentList() &&
140→            node.treeParent.treeParent.elementType != VALUE_PARAMETER &&
141→            node.treeParent.treeParent.elementType != VALUE_ARGUMENT &&
142→            node.isNotReceiverTargetAnnotation()
143→        ) {
144→            // Disallow:
145→            //     @Foo class Bar
146→            // Allow function parameters and arguments to have annotation on same line as identifier:
147→            //     fun @receiver:Bar String.foo() {}
148→            //     fun foo(
149→            //         @Bar("bar") bar,
150→            //         @Bar("bar") "42",
151→            //     ) {}
152→            checkForAnnotationWithParameterToBePlacedOnSeparateLine(node, emit, autoCorrect)
153→        }
154→
155→        if (node.isOnSameLineAsAnnotatedConstruct()) {
156→            if (node.isPrecededByAnnotationOnAnotherLine()) {
157→                // Code below is disallowed
158→                //   @Foo1
159→                //   @Foo2 fun foo() {}
160→                emit(
161→                    node.startOffset,
162→                    "Annotation must be placed on a separate line when it is preceded by another annotation on a separate line",
163→                    true,
164→                )
165→                if (autoCorrect) {
166→                    node
167→                        .lastChildLeafOrSelf()
168→                        .nextLeaf()
169→                        ?.upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe(getNewlineWithIndent(node.treeParent))
170→                }
171→            }
172→
173→            if (node.treeParent.elementType != ANNOTATION &&
174→                node.treeParent.treeParent.elementType != VALUE_PARAMETER &&
175→                node.treeParent.treeParent.elementType != VALUE_ARGUMENT &&
176→                node.isPrecededByOtherAnnotationEntryOnTheSameLine() &&
177→                node.isLastAnnotationEntry()
178→            ) {
179→                // Code below is disallowed
180→                //   @Foo1 @Foo2 fun foo() {}
181→                // But following is allowed:
182→                //   @[Foo1 Foo2] fun foo() {}
183→                //   fun foo(@Bar1 @Bar2 bar) {}
184→                emit(
185→                    node.findAnnotatedConstruct().startOffset,
186→                    "Multiple annotations should not be placed on the same line as the annotated construct",
187→                    true,
188→                )
189→                if (autoCorrect) {
190→                    node
191→                        .lastChildLeafOrSelf()
192→                        .nextCodeLeaf()
193→                        ?.upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe(
194→                            getNewlineWithIndent(node.treeParent)
195→                                .applyIf(node.typeProjectionOrNull() != null) {
196→                                    plus(indentConfig.indent)
197→                                },
198→                        )
199→                }
200→            }
201→
202→            node.typeProjectionOrNull()
203→                ?.prevCodeLeaf()
204→                ?.let { startOfList ->
205→                    // Code below is disallowed
206→                    //   var foo: List<@Foo1 @Foo2 String>
207→                    // But following is allowed:
208→                    //   var foo: List<@[Foo1 Foo2] String>
209→                    //   fun foo(@Bar1 @Bar2 bar) {}
210→                    if (node.isFollowedByOtherAnnotationEntryOnTheSameLine() &&
211→                        node.isFirstAnnotationEntry()
212→                    ) {
213→                        emit(startOfList.startOffset, "Expected newline after '${startOfList.text}'", true)
214→                        if (autoCorrect) {
215→                            startOfList
216→                                .upsertWhitespaceAfterMe(
217→                                    getNewlineWithIndent(node.treeParent).plus(indentConfig.indent),
218→                                )
219→                        }
220→                    }
221→                    if (node.isPrecededByOtherAnnotationEntryOnTheSameLine() &&
222→                        node.isLastAnnotationEntry()
223→                    ) {
224→                        node
225→                            .findAnnotatedConstruct()
226→                            .treeParent
227→                            .lastChildLeafOrSelf()
228→                            .nextLeaf { it.isCodeLeaf() && it.elementType != ElementType.COMMA }
229→                            ?.let { codeLeaf ->
230→                                emit(codeLeaf.startOffset, "Expected newline before '${codeLeaf.text}'", true)
231→                                if (autoCorrect) {
232→                                    codeLeaf.upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe(getNewlineWithIndent(node.treeParent))
233→                                }
234→                            }
235→                    }
236→                }
237→        }
238→
239→        if (node.isPrecededByOtherAnnotationEntryOnTheSameLine() && node.isPrecededByAnnotationOnAnotherLine()) {
240→            // Code below is disallowed
241→            //   @Foo1
242→            //   @Foo2 @Foo3
243→            //   fun foo() {}
244→            emit(
245→                node.startOffset,
246→                "All annotations should either be on a single line or all annotations should be on a separate line",
247→                true,
248→            )
249→            if (autoCorrect) {
250→                node
251→                    .firstChildLeafOrSelf()
252→                    .upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe(getNewlineWithIndent(node.treeParent))
253→            }
254→        }
255→    }
256→
257→    private fun ASTNode.typeProjectionOrNull() =
258→        takeIf { elementType == ANNOTATION_ENTRY }
259→            ?.takeIf { it.treeParent.elementType == MODIFIER_LIST }
260→            ?.treeParent
261→            ?.takeIf { it.treeParent.elementType == TYPE_REFERENCE }
262→            ?.treeParent
263→            ?.takeIf { it.treeParent.elementType == TYPE_PROJECTION }
264→            ?.treeParent
265→
266→    private fun ASTNode.isPrimaryConstructorAnnotation() =
267→        takeIf { elementType == ANNOTATION_ENTRY }
268→            ?.takeIf { it.treeParent.elementType == MODIFIER_LIST }
269→            ?.treeParent
270→            ?.takeIf { it.treeParent.elementType == PRIMARY_CONSTRUCTOR }
271→            .let { it != null }
272→
273→    private fun visitPrimaryConstructorAnnotation(
274→        node: ASTNode,
275→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
276→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
277→    ) {
278→        val expectedIndent = getNewlineWithIndent(node.treeParent).plus(indentConfig.indent)
279→        if (node.isFirstAnnotationEntry()) {
280→            // Annotation before constructor should be on separate line from class identifier:
281→            //    data class Foo @Bar1 constructor()
282→            // should be formatted as:
283→            //    data class Foo
284→            //        @Bar1
285→            //        constructor()
286→            node
287→                .firstChildLeafOrSelf()
288→                .prevLeaf()
289→                ?.takeIf { it.elementType == WHITE_SPACE && !it.textContains('\n') }
290→                ?.let {
291→                    emit(node.startOffset, "Expected newline before annotation", true)
292→                    if (autoCorrect) {
293→                        node.firstChildLeafOrSelf().upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe(expectedIndent)
294→                    }
295→                }
296→        }
297→        if (node.isFollowedByOtherAnnotationEntryOnTheSameLine()) {
298→            // Each annotation should be on a separate line:
299→            //    data class Foo @Bar1 @Bar2 constructor()
300→            // should be formatted as:
301→            //    data class Foo
302→            //        @Bar1
303→            //        @Bar2
304→            //        constructor()
305→            emit(node.startOffset, "Expected each annotation to be on a separate line", true)
306→            if (autoCorrect) {
307→                node.lastChildLeafOrSelf().nextLeaf()?.upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe(expectedIndent)
308→            }
309→        }
310→        if (node.isLastAnnotationEntry()) {
311→            // Last annotation should be on separate line from constructor keyword:
312→            //    data class Foo @Bar1 constructor()
313→            // should be formatted as:
314→            //    data class Foo
315→            //        @Bar1
316→            //        constructor()
317→            node
318→                .treeParent
319→                .treeParent
320→                .findChildByType(CONSTRUCTOR_KEYWORD)
321→                ?.let { constructorKeyword ->
322→                    val prevLeaf = constructorKeyword.prevLeaf()
323→                    if (prevLeaf?.elementType == WHITE_SPACE && !prevLeaf.textContains('\n')) {
324→                        emit(constructorKeyword.startOffset, "Expected newline before 'constructor' keyword", true)
325→                        if (autoCorrect) {
326→                            constructorKeyword.upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe(expectedIndent)
327→                        }
328→                    }
329→                }
330→        }
331→    }
332→
333→    private fun ASTNode.isPrecededByAnnotationOnAnotherLine(): Boolean {
334→        val firstAnnotation = treeParent.findChildByType(ANNOTATION_ENTRY)
335→        return siblings(forward = false)
336→            .takeWhile { it != firstAnnotation }
337→            .any { it.isWhiteSpaceWithNewline() }
338→    }
339→
340→    private fun checkForAnnotationWithParameterToBePlacedOnSeparateLine(
341→        node: ASTNode,
342→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
343→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
344→    ) {
345→        if (node.isPrecededByOtherAnnotationEntry() && node.isOnSameLineAsPreviousAnnotationEntry()) {
346→            emit(
347→                node.startOffset,
348→                "Annotation with parameter(s) should be placed on a separate line prior to the annotated construct",
349→                true,
350→            )
351→            if (autoCorrect) {
352→                node
353→                    .firstChildLeafOrSelf()
354→                    .upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe(" ")
355→            }
356→        }
357→
358→        if (node.isOnSameLineAsNextAnnotationEntryOrAnnotatedConstruct()) {
359→            emit(
360→                node.startOffset,
361→                "Annotation with parameter(s) should be placed on a separate line prior to the annotated construct",
362→                // Annotated expressions for which the annotation contains a parameter can be hard to correct
363→                // automatically. See examples below. For now, let them be fixed manually.
364→                // fun foo1() = @Suppress("DEPRECATION") bar()
365→                // if (@Suppress("DEPRECATION") bar()) { .. }
366→                node.treeParent.elementType != ANNOTATED_EXPRESSION,
367→            )
368→            if (autoCorrect) {
369→                node
370→                    .lastChildLeafOrSelf()
371→                    .nextLeaf()
372→                    .safeAs<LeafPsiElement>()
373→                    ?.let {
374→                        if (it.elementType == WHITE_SPACE) {
375→                            it.replaceWithText(getNewlineWithIndent(node.treeParent))
376→                        } else {
377→                            it.rawInsertBeforeMe(
378→                                PsiWhiteSpaceImpl(getNewlineWithIndent(node.treeParent)),
379→                            )
380→                        }
381→                    }
382→            }
383→        }
384→    }
385→
386→    private fun ASTNode.isNotReceiverTargetAnnotation() = getAnnotationUseSiteTarget() != AnnotationUseSiteTarget.RECEIVER
387→
388→    private fun ASTNode.getAnnotationUseSiteTarget() =
389→        psi
390→            .safeAs<KtAnnotationEntry>()
391→            ?.useSiteTarget
392→            ?.getAnnotationUseSiteTarget()
393→
394→    private fun ASTNode.isAnnotationEntryWithValueArgumentList() = getAnnotationEntryValueArgumentList() != null
395→
396→    private fun ASTNode.getAnnotationEntryValueArgumentList() =
397→        takeIf { it.elementType == ANNOTATION_ENTRY }
398→            ?.findChildByType(VALUE_ARGUMENT_LIST)
399→
400→    private fun ASTNode.isFirstAnnotationEntry() =
401→        this ==
402→            treeParent
403→                .children()
404→                .firstOrNull { it.elementType == ANNOTATION_ENTRY }
405→
406→    private fun ASTNode.isLastAnnotationEntry() =
407→        this ==
408→            treeParent
409→                .children()
410→                .lastOrNull { it.elementType == ANNOTATION_ENTRY }
411→
412→    private fun ASTNode.isPrecededByOtherAnnotationEntryOnTheSameLine() =
413→        siblings(forward = false)
414→            .takeWhile { !it.isWhiteSpaceWithNewline() }
415→            .any { it.elementType == ANNOTATION_ENTRY }
416→
417→    private fun ASTNode.isFollowedByOtherAnnotationEntryOnTheSameLine() =
418→        siblings()
419→            .takeWhile { !it.isWhiteSpaceWithNewline() }
420→            .any { it.elementType == ANNOTATION_ENTRY }
421→
422→    private fun ASTNode.isPrecededByOtherAnnotationEntry() =
423→        siblings(forward = false)
424→            .any { it.elementType == ANNOTATION_ENTRY }
425→
426→    private fun ASTNode.isOnSameLineAsPreviousAnnotationEntry() =
427→        siblings(forward = false)
428→            .takeWhile { it.elementType != ANNOTATION_ENTRY }
429→            .none { it.isWhiteSpaceWithNewline() }
430→
431→    private fun ASTNode.isFollowedByOtherAnnotationEntry() = siblings(forward = true).any { it.elementType == ANNOTATION_ENTRY }
432→
433→    private fun ASTNode.isOnSameLineAsNextAnnotationEntry() =
434→        siblings(forward = true)
435→            .takeWhile { it.elementType != ANNOTATION_ENTRY }
436→            .none { it.isWhiteSpaceWithNewline() }
437→
438→    private fun ASTNode.isOnSameLineAsAnnotatedConstruct(): Boolean {
439→        val annotatedConstruct = findAnnotatedConstruct()
440→        return lastChildLeafOrSelf()
441→            .leaves(forward = true)
442→            .takeWhile { it != annotatedConstruct }
443→            .none { it.isWhiteSpaceWithNewline() }
444→    }
445→
446→    private fun ASTNode.findAnnotatedConstruct(): ASTNode {
447→        val astNode =
448→            if (treeParent.elementType == MODIFIER_LIST) {
449→                treeParent
450→            } else {
451→                this
452→            }
453→        return checkNotNull(
454→            astNode.lastChildLeafOrSelf().nextCodeLeaf(),
455→        )
456→    }
457→
458→    private fun ASTNode.isOnSameLineAsNextAnnotationEntryOrAnnotatedConstruct() =
459→        if (isFollowedByOtherAnnotationEntry()) {
460→            isOnSameLineAsNextAnnotationEntry()
461→        } else {
462→            isOnSameLineAsAnnotatedConstruct()
463→        }
464→
465→    private fun visitFileAnnotationList(
466→        node: ASTNode,
467→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
468→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
469→    ) {
470→        node
471→            .lastChildLeafOrSelf()
472→            .nextCodeLeaf()
473→            ?.let { codeLeaf ->
474→                val whitespaceBefore = codeLeaf.prevLeaf { it.isWhiteSpace() }
475→
476→                if (whitespaceBefore == null || whitespaceBefore.text != "\n\n") {
477→                    emit(
478→                        codeLeaf.startOffset,
479→                        "File annotations should be separated from file contents with a blank line",
480→                        true,
481→                    )
482→                    if (autoCorrect) {
483→                        codeLeaf.upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe("\n\n")
484→                    }
485→                }
486→            }
487→    }
488→
489→    private fun visitAnnotation(
490→        node: ASTNode,
491→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
492→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
493→    ) {
494→        require(node.elementType == ANNOTATION)
495→
496→        if ((node.isFollowedByOtherAnnotationEntry() && node.isOnSameLineAsNextAnnotationEntry()) ||
497→            (node.isPrecededByOtherAnnotationEntry() && node.isOnSameLineAsPreviousAnnotationEntry())
498→        ) {
499→            emit(
500→                node.startOffset,
501→                "@[...] style annotations should be on a separate line from other annotations.",
502→                true,
503→            )
504→            if (autoCorrect) {
505→                if (node.isFollowedByOtherAnnotationEntry()) {
506→                    node.upsertWhitespaceAfterMe(getNewlineWithIndent(node.treeParent))
507→                } else if (node.isPrecededByOtherAnnotationEntry()) {
508→                    node.upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe(getNewlineWithIndent(node.treeParent))
509→                }
510→            }
511→        }
512→    }
513→
514→    private fun getNewlineWithIndent(modifierListRoot: ASTNode): String {
515→        val nodeBeforeAnnotations =
516→            modifierListRoot
517→                .treeParent
518→                .treePrev
519→        // Make sure we only insert a single newline
520→        val indentWithoutNewline =
521→            nodeBeforeAnnotations
522→                ?.text
523→                .orEmpty()
524→                .substringAfterLast('\n')
525→        return "\n".plus(indentWithoutNewline)
526→    }
527→}
528→
529→public val ANNOTATION_RULE_ID: RuleId = AnnotationRule().ruleId
530→
